title: HOME_HUB
description: Home automation and control center built on Node.js, integrating smart devices, media systems, and environmental controls into a unified interface for seamless management.

title: GRADE_ASSIST
description: A local Node.js tool that reduces grading time in Blackboard Ultra at FVTC. It auto-launches Chrome, authenticates via Blackboard OAuth2, discovers submissions that need grading, runs configured grading scripts, and presents results in a local dashboard where you can review and apply grades back to Blackboard.

title: RYAN-APPEL_COM
description: Personal portfolio and blog built with Astro, showcasing projects, teaching courses, and technical writing. The site is optimized for performance and accessibility, featuring a clean design and dynamic content generation.

title: FVTC_SOFTWARE
description: FVTC IT department website for displaying instructional content and assignments to students. Built on Node.js with a custom server that dynamically generates content for instructors from their github repositories.

title: ARCADE_SHOOTER
description: A shmup (shoot-em-up) prototype built for students of FVTC to build upon. The project features a custom engine built in C++ with Allegro, designed for rapid iteration and modular development. The prototype includes basic player movement, shooting mechanics, and enemy spawning, serving as a foundation for students to implement additional features and gameplay elements. The intent is to deploy to an arcade cabinet in the FVTC IT department for students to play.

title: CUBE_CREATOR_3D
description: I created the initial prototype for Cube Creator 3D, A Minecraft-like sandbox game for the Nintendo 3DS. The prototype was built in C++ using the Nintendo 3DS SDK, featuring basic movement, block placement, and touch-screen inventory system. The project was developed as a proof of concept to demonstrate the feasibility of a voxel-based game on the 3DS hardware, and served as the foundation for the full game development by Big John Games and later Arc System Works. Note: The original link to the nintendo page for the game was removed when the e-shop was taken down. I will link to the review on Nintendo World Report.

title: STRIKE_FORCE_FOXX
description: I was lead developer on Strike Force Foxx, an updated verson of the classic choplifter formula for the Nintendo 3DS. The game was built in C++ using the Nintendo 3DS SDK. Note: The original link to the nintendo page for the game was removed when the e-shop was taken down. I will link to the review on Nintendo World Report.
